title: instance_v1 and instance_v2 duplicate contact account query
description: File: src/api.rs:instance_v1 and instance_v2. Both endpoints independently query the first persona with the same SQL (SELECT ... FROM accounts ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1), then call fetch_account_counts and account_to_json_with_counts. Extract a helper like load_contact_account(pool, domain) to remove the duplication.
